data.title: Wall Street analysts discuss 3 real estate stocks with over 6% dividend yields. Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. has a dividend yield of 8.98%, with analyst accuracy rate of 64%. Truist Securities analyst Patrick Scholes downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold. Read more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In times of market turbulence, many investors seek dividend-yielding stocks, which are typically companies with strong free cash flows that reward shareholders with high dividends. For the latest analyst opinions on popular stocks, Benzinga offers an Analyst Stock Ratings page where readers can access ratings from accurate analysts. Among the top analysts for three high-yielding stocks in real estate are: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) with a dividend yield of 8.98%. Analyst Daniel Politzer from JP Morgan started coverage on June 23, 2025, with an Underweight rating and a $10 price target, boasting a 64% accuracy rate. Truist Securities analyst Patrick Scholes recently downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold, reducing the price target from $16 to $11. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Bitcoin falls below $117,000 due to whale selloffs. Ethereum holds at $3,730.88. XRP stays steady at $3.13. 141,129 traders liquidated for $534.38M. Tweets on short squeeze possibility near $115,000 level.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a slight decline as Bitcoin drops below $117,000 due to increased whale selloffs. Prices of major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin - $116,634.79, Ethereum - $3,730.88, Solana - $181.14, XRP - $3.13, Dogecoin - $0.2325, and Shiba Inu - $0.00001369. Key stats reveal a 5.8% and 5.1% rise in large transactions for Bitcoin and Ethereum, while daily active addresses dropped 6% and grew 3.5%, respectively. Coinglass reported liquidation of 141,129 traders totaling $534.38 million in 24 hours. IntoTheBlock data shows net inflows of $226.6 million into spot Bitcoin ETFs and $231.2 million into spot Ethereum ETFs. Traders are monitoring Bitcoin's movement below $117,000 with expectations that spot buyers at $115,000 could lead to a short squeeze. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UAE prefabricated construction market to grow at 6.8% CAGR, set to reach AED 34.28 billion by 2029.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report titled "United Arab Emirates Prefabricated Construction Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. It projects that the prefabricated construction sector in the United Arab Emirates will experience an annual growth rate of 8%, with an expected market value of AED 24.49 billion by 2025. The market analysis covers over 100 key performance indicators, along with forecasts based on end markets, precast products, and precast materials.

data.title: Incannex Healthcare appoints Dr. Charlene E. Gamaldo to its OSA Clinical Advisory Board, Nasdaq: IXHL, July 25, 2025.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Incannex Healthcare Inc. (Nasdaq: IXHL) disclosed the addition of Charlene E. Gamaldo, M.D. to its IHL-42X Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA) Clinical Advisory Board. Incannex, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity focusing on combination drug therapies for significant medical conditions, made the announcement from New York and Melbourne, Australia.

data.title: Saia, Inc. (Nasdaq: SAIA) Q2 2025 earnings per share: $2.67 vs $3.83 in Q2 2024. Revenue and other details not mentioned.
data.description: In Johns Creek, Georgia, as of July 25, 2025, Saia, Inc. (Nasdaq: SAIA), a prominent transportation company providing national less-than-truckload (LTL), non-asset truckload, expedited, and logistics services, disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The diluted earnings per share for this quarter stood at $2.67, marking a decrease from $3.83 recorded in the corresponding period of 2024.

data.title: Galaxy Digital's Mike Novogratz predicts Ethereum to surpass $4,000, expects it to outperform Bitcoin in the next months.
data.description: According to CEO of Galaxy Digital, Michael Novogratz, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) could surpass Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in performance in the next three to six months as institutional investors shift towards Ethereum. In an interview with CNBC, Novogratz cited macroeconomic factors and increased capital inflows as driving forces behind the momentum in the crypto market. Galaxy Digital's optimism towards Ethereum is reflected in its onchain activity, with the company currently holding over 52,000 ETH valued at around $193.95 million, making it the second-largest crypto position after Bitcoin. Novogratz mentioned that if Ethereum surpasses the $4,000 mark, it would enter a phase of price discovery. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Danaos Corp (NYSE: DAC) to release Q2 2025 results on July 25, 2025, after market close in New York.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Athens, Greece, Danaos Corporation, a leading global containership owner, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025, concluding on June 30. The report is scheduled to be made public after the New York market closes on Monday. Danaos Corporation, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DAC, is renowned for being one of the largest independent containership proprietors worldwide.

data.title: Taiho Oncology to present preliminary findings from Cohort C of REZILIENT2 trial on zipalertinib at ESMO Congress 2025.
data.description: Initial results will be disclosed from Cohort C in the REZILIENT2 study of zipalertinib in individuals with active brain metastases, diagnosed with exon 20 insertion (ex20ins) or other rare mutation epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-mutant non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The data will be shared from the trial conducted in Princeton, N.J.

data.title: Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL) will report Q2 2025 financial results on August 4, 2025, owning 2,150 properties leased primarily to USPS.
data.description: Cedarhurst, New York, July 25, 2025 - Postal Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PSTL), a real estate investment trust managing 2,150+ properties leased to the USPS, will release its financial results for the period ending June 30, 2025, on August 4, 2025, after the market closes. The Company specializes in properties like last-mile post offices and industrial facilities.

data.title: BriaCell presents two clinical data posters at ESMO 2025 Annual Meeting in Berlin. Company develops immunotherapies for cancer.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology firm specializing in developing innovative immunotherapies for cancer treatment, has disclosed that it will be presenting two clinical data posters at the European Society for Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress 2025 Annual Meeting happening from October 17 to 21 in Berlin, Germany. The presentations will showcase recent developments in the company’s research. The company’s stock is listed under the tickers Nasdaq: BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ and TSX: BCT. The event is set to feature a range of discussions and presentations focusing on advancements in cancer care.

data.title: Bombardier delivers first Challenger 3500 jet in Costa Rica, leading in super-midsize segment for 2 decades.
data.description: July 25, 2025 - Bombardier has recently completed the delivery of the initial Challenger 3500 business jet in Costa Rica, signifying a notable achievement for the company within Central America. This aircraft model has been at the forefront of the super-midsize category for more than twenty years. The Challenger 3500 jet is renowned for providing customers worldwide with unparalleled performance, comfort, and reliability.

data.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin gains popularity among retail users despite initial focus on institutions.
data.description: Before being launched, some Ripple executives indicated that RLUSD might only be used by institutions. However, the stablecoin is now experiencing significant popularity in the retail sector.

data.title: TRYNGOLZA® recommended for EU approval by CHMP for FCS with Phase 3 Balance results showing reduced triglycerides & less pancreatitis. European Commission decision expected by Q4 2025.
data.description: Following the Phase 3 Balance study, which revealed a notable decrease in triglyceride levels and a substantial drop in cases of acute pancreatitis, it is advised to consider TRYNGOLZA. The European Commission is anticipated to make a decision regarding this by the fourth quarter of 2025. The results were particularly encouraging, with a significant positive impact on health outcomes. The company involved, Sobi® (STO: SOBI), is optimistic about the potential of TRYNGOLZA and is eagerly awaiting regulatory approval. The study outcomes underscore the importance of this development in mitigating health risks associated with triglyceride levels, emphasizing the potential benefits for patients worldwide.
